sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Juggling
special_mechanics.description: Knock opponent into air and follow up with combination attacks while enemy is airborne and defenseless

special_mechanics.name: Block Damage
special_mechanics.description: Characters take small amount of damage from regular moves while blocking, with very little ground loss on successful block

special_mechanics.name: Uppercut
special_mechanics.description: Special attack that knocks enemy high into the air and causes much damage

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Fighting game with no detailed movement physics documentation available. Genesis port released September 13, 1993. No specific sub-pixel or numerical physics parameters documented in available sources.
